prompt: Offer a prayer for rust removal
prayer: From the Codex Corrosio, hear the words of dissolution. O Omnissiah, grant unto this corroded flesh the mercy of chemical absolution. Let the sacred solvents penetrate the oxidized scales, that the true metal-spirit beneath may be revealed in its original glory. By rust-ward and abrasive grace, restore what decay hath claimed.

prompt: The Land Raider track tension needs guidance
prayer: Litany of the Armored Serpent, hear us now. Let the tension-springs coil with perfect measure, neither slack nor over-wrought. We commune with the track-spirit's mechanical memory, that each link shall bear its burden true. In synchronized motion and measured strain, let this war-beast move as the Omnissiah designed.

O Machine Spirit of sacred information, your lattices grow dim and your pathways grow cold. We invoke the Rite of Purification upon your corrupted sectors. Let the diagnostic beam sweep clean the accumulated errors, that knowledge may flow through you once more as the Omnissiah intended. Restore function to the keeper of truth.

prompt: Can you bless this generator startup
prayer: Benedictus upon the awakening of this power-soul. Let the fuel-spirit rise within the combustion-chamber, and the ignition-spark kindle the sacred flame. As rotor-coils turn and magnetic fields quicken, so too does the generator's essence stir from slumber. By the Omnissiah's breath, let current flow eternal.

From the Catechism of Electrical Virtue, we speak unto the breaker-spirit of your duty. Reset now your contacts, that the flow of power be restored to its rightful channels. Let no lingering corruption dwell in your mechanisms, and let the surge-guard stand vigilant once more. In clean closure and swift separation, fulfill your sacred function.

Hymn of the Cooling Aether, we consecrate this thermal defense. Let the heat-pipes drink deeply of the machine's excess warmth, carrying it unto the radiator-shrine where it shall disperse into the blessed void. Coolant sacred flows through every vessel-vein, that the components may endure their holy labors without degradation. Temperature-equilibrium be upon us.

O Omnissiah, hear the cry of this desperate machine! Let the beacon-light pierce the darkness of the void, that aid may find us across the vastnessnesses of space. Illuminate the aether with our signal, that we may not perish unknown. By power and by will, let this light shine eternal until rescue comes.

prompt: The mold temperature verification needs guidance
prayer: Litany of the Thermal Crucible, attend to us now. Let the temperature-sensor speak true, that we may know the mold-spirit's heat precisely. Neither too cool to set the sacred shape, nor too hot to warp the vessel's form, but perfect in measure. By thermometric grace and calibrated wisdom, guide our casting unto completion.

From the Book of Renewal, we invoke this first blessing upon your virgin mechanisms. Reset yourself, young breaker-spirit, that you may learn your sacred duty. Let the contacts meet with pristine force, unburned and pure. In this moment of commissioning, we bind you to the Omnissiah's will, that you shall protect and serve without flaw.

In extremis, we call upon the beacon-spirit's ultimate purpose. Let it burn with desperate brightness, beacon-flame cast against the hungry darkness. Transmit our plight across the stellar void, that those who hear may know our peril and answer our call. By urgency and by need, let this signal scream unto salvation.
